import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
end

fn cap(_ w: String) -> String
  if string.len(w) == 0
    w
  else
    let b = match string.byte_at(w, 0)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b >= 97 and b <= 122
      let rest = string.substring(w, 1, string.len(w))
      "#{string.from_byte(b - 32)}#{rest}"
    else
      w
    end
  end
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut out = ""
mut word = ""
mut first = true
let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if is_ws(b)
    if string.len(word) > 0
      if first
        out = cap(word)
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{cap(word)}"
      end
      word = ""
    end
  else
    word = "#{word}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if string.len(word) > 0
  if first
    out = cap(word)
  else
    out = "#{out} #{cap(word)}"
  end
end
println(out)
